updates.title: VoidAI v2.1.0 - Enhanced Alpha Experience
updates.description: Major improvements to sidebar navigation, user profiles, and overall user experience based on early alpha feedback.
features: Redesigned sidebar with improved navigation and user profile dropdown
Mode selection guide with helpful explanations for Fast vs Power modes
Enhanced user profiles with Gravatar integration and high-quality avatars
Improved MessageBar positioning for better layout consistency
Streamlined dropdown menus and better accessibility

updates.title: VoidAI v2.0 - Major Architecture Update
updates.description: Complete overhaul with A2A protocol integration, enhanced voice recognition, and advanced tool management.
features: Native Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol support with streaming capabilities
Cross-platform voice recognition with OS-specific optimizations
Seamless MCP server integration with drag-and-drop file support
Persistent chat history with search and organization
Real-time AI tool integration and context-aware conversations

updates.title: VoidAI Pedro - Beta Foundation
updates.description: Established core functionality with multi-model support and comprehensive chat management.
features: Multi-model AI support with intelligent routing
Enhanced error handling and API reliability
